data.body: Checkpoint 4/6: Script created and RED marker added to .test-index. Script exits 1 without opt-out (403 on acli.atlassian.com). Added acli.atlassian.com to opt-out for CDN WAF blocks. With opt-out, current docs pass cleanly. RED marker added: README.md:tests/test-doc-links.sh [test_doc_links] and plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md:tests/test-doc-links.sh [test_doc_links].
